what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates an attachment identifier with a board-item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no additional body content.
standouts: It links attachment att-7fb224fd to a board item via a board:// URI-style target.
It functions as a timestamped provenance stub rather than a content-bearing document.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Represents external targets with a URI-style scheme (board://...).
notes: A timestamped metadata stub that attaches att-7fb224fd to board item item-1bfe72a0 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or action does board://item-1bfe72a0 represent?
Is the relationship to the board item intended to be bidirectional?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific channel attachment belongs to a board item, enabling cross-referencing between channel memory and project board entries.
novelty: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item, which is a distinct addressing convention.
contribution: Provides a dated, typed association between an attachment identifier and a board item, supporting traceability from channel artifacts to board entries.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata stub for attachment att-7fb224fd of type board_items, linking it to board item item-1bfe72a0 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment is associated with a specific board item for later retrieval and provenance.
